name: 9ui-command
title: Command
author: borabaloglu
description: Provides a searchable command list with grouped items, keyboard navigation, and an optional modal presentation.

changes: Changed the dialog and cn imports from upstream aliases to source-local relative paths and changed the shortcut margin to a logical RTL-aware utility.
Renamed the internal support file, changed Base UI and cn imports to portable source-local subpaths, and replaced physical right/text-left utilities with logical RTL-aware utilities.

modifications.change: Repointed local aliases to copied support files and changed ml-auto to ms-auto.
modifications.reason: Keep the item self-contained and preserve shortcut alignment in both LTR and RTL directions.

modifications.change: Renamed the support target, used the Base UI dialog subpath and copied cn helper, and changed right/text-left utilities to end/text-start.
modifications.reason: Avoid a generic public Dialog target while keeping the copied closure portable and RTL-aware.
